Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigSellingAllItemsFrameMixin); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_ALL_ITEMS_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_TBC_ALL_ITEMS
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_12; self.value = 12
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_24; self.value = 24
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUCTION_DURATION_48; self.value = 48
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup(); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DEFAULT_AUCTION_DURATION

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SAVE_LAST_DURATION_AS_DEFAULT_TOOLTIP_TEXT
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE; self.value = "percentage"
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_SET_VALUE; self.value = "static"
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup(); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_PREFERENCE

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_TEXT

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigMoneyInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_SET_VALUE_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_UNDERCUT_TOOLTIP_TEXT
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading(); self.subHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DEFAULT_STACK_SIZES

Mixin(self, AuctionatorStackOfInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_DEFAULT_QUANTITY_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self.classID = Enum.ItemClass.Armor
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading(); self.subHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_SELLING_GEAR_VENDOR_PRICE_MULTIPLIER_TOOLTIP_TEXT
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self:InitializeSubHeading(); self.subHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STARTING_PRICE_PERCENTAGE

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigNumericInputMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STARTING_PRICE_PERCENTAGE_SUFFIX; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STARTING_PRICE_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_STARTING_PRICE_PERCENTAGE_TOOLTIP_TEXT
